## Checklist

- [ ] Scripts remain idempotent (safe to re-run)
- [ ] No new dependencies beyond bash, Docker, curl, redis-cli
- [ ] Sensitive values (MACs, IPs, tokens) are not hardcoded
- [ ] Comments explain *why*, not just *what*
